title: Transfer of Powers and Duties (Commissioner for Mines) Notice, 1967
title_en: Transfer of Powers and Duties (Commissioner for Mines) Notice, 1967

provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Transfer of Powers and Duties (Commissioner for Mines) Notice.

The powers and duties conferred upon the Commissioner for Mines by the enactments specified in the Schedule hereto are hereby conferred upon the Commissioner for Mineral Resources. Schedule The Mining Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 123 ). The Mining (Controlled Areas) Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 124 ). The Mining (Loans) Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 125 ). The Gold Trading Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 127 ). The Assayers Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 128 ). The Diamond Industry Protection Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 129 ). The Mineral (Mineral Oil) Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 399 ). The Explosives Act, 1963 (R.L. Cap. 538).
